title: Vegan One Pot Stone Bowl
description: A hearty and comforting vegan dish made in one pot and served in a bowl over a bed of stone-ground rice.

ingredients.name: Bowl of broth
ingredients.notes: vegan broth, such as vegetable or mushroom

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the black beans, rice, and broth to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the rice is tender.
Fluff the rice with a fork and serve in bowls over a bed of stone-ground rice.
